metadata.description: Document-management workflows for kssni: validate, audit, and auto-maintain Markdown specs and docs cross-referenced via the kssni CLI.

plugins.name: kssni
plugins.description: Slash commands and skills wrapping the kssni CLI: /kssni:setup installs the binary, /kssni:sync auto-maintains related docs after code or doc changes (parallel fan-out at 4+ affected docs), /kssni:check audits cross-references, /kssni:add-ref authors `refs:` frontmatter. Auto-loaded skills carry the canonical schema and kinds-manifest format.
